metadata.description: Curated sources for production prompt engineering: output contracts, evaluation/regression testing, tool/RAG prompting, security, and multi-agent orchestration.

standards_and_security.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
standards_and_security.relevance: Threat categories and mitigations for prompt injection, data leakage, and tool misuse.

standards_and_security.name: OWASP LLM Prompt Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet
standards_and_security.relevance: Step-by-step prevention techniques for prompt injection attacks with defense-in-depth strategies.

standards_and_security.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
standards_and_security.relevance: Governance baseline for risk assessment, controls, and documentation impacting prompts, logging, and evaluations.

standards_and_security.name: NIST Generative AI Profile (AI 600-1)
standards_and_security.relevance: GenAI-specific profile aligned to NIST AI RMF; useful for prompt safety and monitoring control mapping.

standards_and_security.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
standards_and_security.relevance: Regulatory baseline for transparency and documentation requirements that often affect prompt logging and outputs.

standards_and_security.name: JSON Schema
standards_and_security.relevance: Schema standard for structured outputs, tool I/O validation, and contract testing.

standards_and_security.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
standards_and_security.relevance: Telemetry standard for tokens, latency, and model metadata needed for prompt monitoring and regression detection.

prompt_and_tool_use_research.name: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
prompt_and_tool_use_research.relevance: Foundational prompting technique; informs when hidden reasoning may help (avoid requiring full traces in production).

prompt_and_tool_use_research.name: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
prompt_and_tool_use_research.relevance: Core pattern for tool use; informs agent/tool prompting and error handling structure.

prompt_and_tool_use_research.name: Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning
prompt_and_tool_use_research.relevance: Reference for sampling-based reliability improvements; use cautiously with cost controls.

prompt_and_tool_use_research.name: Toolformer
prompt_and_tool_use_research.relevance: Reference for learning tool-use behaviors and understanding tool-calling error modes.

prompt_and_tool_use_research.name: Constitutional AI
prompt_and_tool_use_research.relevance: Reference for safety-aligned behavior via explicit principles; useful for policy scaffolding patterns.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: OpenAI OpenAPI Specification (GitHub)
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Provider reference (OpenAPI) for request/response schemas and tool-related API behavior; useful for contract testing.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: Anthropic Documentation
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Provider-specific prompt/tool guidance and safety behavior notes.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: Claude Extended Thinking Documentation
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Native extended thinking API: budget management, thinking blocks, multishot patterns, when to use vs think tool.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: The Think Tool - Anthropic Engineering
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Think tool pattern for stopping and thinking during response generation; complements extended thinking.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: Anthropic Tool Use Documentation
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Provider-specific tool calling reference (schemas, tool inputs/outputs).

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: Google Gemini Documentation
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Provider-specific reference for multimodal prompting and deployment behavior.

vendor_docs_and_guides.name: OpenAI Agents SDK (Python)
vendor_docs_and_guides.relevance: Reference implementation for agent orchestration patterns and tool-use workflows in OpenAI's SDK.

evaluation_and_testing.name: Promptfoo - Prompt Testing Framework
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Declarative prompt testing with CI/CD integration (GitHub Actions), red teaming, vulnerability scanning for LLMs.

evaluation_and_testing.name: DeepEval - LLM Evaluation Framework
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Unit testing for LLM outputs (pytest-style), 40+ safety vulnerability red teaming, CI/CD integration.

evaluation_and_testing.name: OpenAI Evals
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Reference implementation for building eval suites and regression tests.

evaluation_and_testing.name: HELM
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Benchmarking and evaluation framework; useful for thinking about broad evaluation coverage.

evaluation_and_testing.name: OpenAI Cookbook
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Practical examples for structured outputs, tool calling, and evaluation patterns (provider-specific).

evaluation_and_testing.name: LangSmith Documentation
evaluation_and_testing.relevance: Example observability/eval tooling for prompts and traces (tooling example).
